subcodes.first_line: My God, My God! Praise be unto Thee for having made me dwell in the realms of exile and having abandoned me to the clutches of the oppressor
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لک الحمد بما اسکنتنی فی دیار الغربه و ترکتنی بین ایادی الظالمین و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
